name: Future FinTech Group Inc.
business: The main business of the Company is supply-chain financing services and trading in China. The Company also conducts brokerage and investment banking business in Hong Kong through its subsidiary FTFT International Securities and Futures Limited.
sellsTo: businesses in China seeking supply-chain financing
clients in Hong Kong for brokerage and consulting services

exposures.sentence: Currently, the main business of the Company is supply-chain financing services and trading in China.
Alpha HK holds Type 1 Securities Trading , Type 2 Futures Contract Trading and Type 4 Securities Consulting financial licenses issued by the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission.
